description: 22-question SAT Math timed-test module — practice version 5. Mirrors the digital-SAT Module 1 structure: 22 questions, 35 minutes, Desmos calculator allowed.

answerFormat.MC: options is array of 4 strings. correct is 0-indexed integer.
answerFormat.SPR: correctAnswer is the canonical string answer. UI should normalize student input.
answerFormat.diagram: Optional SVG string. Frontend should render above question text when present.

questions.question: If 4x - 3 = 13, what is the value of x?
questions.explanation: Add 3 to both sides: 4x = 16. Divide by 4: x = 4.

questions.question: A streaming service charges a one-time setup fee of $10 plus $15 per month. Which equation represents the total cost C, in dollars, after m months of service?
questions.explanation: Monthly cost is 15m; add the one-time fee of $10: C = 15m + 10.

questions.question: What is the slope of the line passing through the points (-2, 7) and (4, -5)?
If (2x + 1)/(3) = 7, what is the value of x?
questions.explanation: Multiply both sides by 3: 2x + 1 = 21. Subtract 1: 2x = 20. Divide: x = 10.

questions.question: If 5x + 2y = 29 and 3x - 2y = 11, what is the value of y?
questions.explanation: Adding the equations eliminates y: 8x = 40, so x = 5. Substituting back: 2y = 29 - 25 = 4, so y = 2.

questions.question: Which of the following is the solution to -3x + 7 ≥ 1?
questions.explanation: Subtract 7: -3x ≥ -6. Divide by -3 (flip the inequality sign): x ≤ 2.

questions.skill: Linear word problem with two unknowns
questions.question: A theater sells adult tickets for $12 and child tickets for $8. On a certain night, 80 tickets were sold for a total of $840. How many adult tickets were sold?
questions.explanation: Let a = adult, c = child. Then a + c = 80 and 12a + 8c = 840. From the first: c = 80 - a. Substitute: 12a + 8(80 - a) = 840 → 4a + 640 = 840 → 4a = 200 → a = 50 adult tickets.

questions.question: If h(x) = x² - 3x + 4, what is the value of h(-2)?
What are the solutions to x² - 9x + 18 = 0?
Which expression is equivalent to (2x³)(5x⁴)?
questions.explanation: Multiply coefficients: 2 · 5 = 10. Add exponents: x^(3+4) = x⁷. Result: 10x⁷.

questions.question: Which expression is equivalent to (x - 5)²?
A culture of yeast cells triples every 4 hours. If there are 100 cells now, how many cells will there be after 12 hours?
For the function f(x) = -2x² + 12x - 5, what is the maximum value of f(x)?
If 12/x = 3/4, what is the value of x?
15% of a number is 27. What is the number?
questions.explanation: Let the number be n. Then 0.15n = 27, so n = 27/0.15 = 180.

questions.question: In a class, 12 students scored an average of 85 on a test, and 8 students scored an average of 75. What was the overall average score for the class?
In a school, the ratio of teachers to students is 1:18. If there are 9 teachers, how many students are there?
A spinner has 8 equal sections numbered 1 through 8. What is the probability of spinning an odd number?
questions.explanation: Odd numbers: 1, 3, 5, 7 — four of them out of 8. Probability = 4/8 = 1/2.

questions.question: A right triangle has one leg of length 8 and a hypotenuse of length 17. What is the length of the other leg?
What is the midpoint of the line segment with endpoints (2, -3) and (8, 5)?
In a right triangle, the leg opposite an acute angle θ has length 7 and the adjacent leg has length 24. What is the value of tan θ?
A circle has radius 6. What is the area of a sector with a central angle of 60°?
questions.explanation: Sector area = θ/360 × π r² = 60/360 × π(6)² = 1/6 × 36π = 6π.
questions.diagram:
<svg viewBox="0 0 300 280" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Sector fill (warm tint) -->
  <path d="M 150 150 L 250 150 A 100 100 0 0 0 200 63.4 Z" fill="#F0D5BE" stroke="none"/>

  <!-- Full circle outline -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="100" fill="none" stroke="#2E2A25" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Two radii (terracotta to highlight) -->
  <line x1="150" y1="150" x2="250" y2="150" stroke="#C4602A" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <line x1="150" y1="150" x2="200" y2="63.4" stroke="#C4602A" stroke-width="2.5"/>

  <!-- Center O -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="3" fill="#2E2A25"/>

  <!-- Radius label (below the horizontal radius line) -->
  <text x="188" y="170" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E2A25">6</text>

  <!-- Central angle marker + label (label stays inside the angle) -->
  <path d="M 175 150 A 25 25 0 0 0 162.5 128.35" fill="none" stroke="#2E2A25" stroke-width="1.8"/>
  <text x="180" y="135" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E2A25">60°</text>
</svg>
